creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
On Mon, 27 Aug 2001, Sheldon Hearn wrote:

> On Mon, 27 Aug 2001 16:16:42 +0200, Matthias Andree wrote:
> 
> > I'm currently cleaning up my make.conf and rebuilding Perl with the
> > PERL_THREADED line removed. Not sure if that requires to build the world
> > anew which will take like 3 hrs. I will check if that makes my Exim
> > difficulties disappear and report back then.
> 
> I'll bet you a beer this fixes the problem. :-)

It did.

Result:

Exim-3.33 doesn't build with PERL_THREADED=true on FreeBSD 4.3-RELEASE.

Would the ports system support a switch to prevent the exim port from
being built with threaded Perl?

Thanks a lot.

Best regards,

-- 
Matthias Andree
